merge_provenance.note: Consolidated 7B results. C0/C1/C3 from results_7b_fixed (INT4 fix applied); C2 (INT8) from results_7b_all (INT8 codepath was never broken). Two separate runs of Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, so the FP16 baselines differ by a small run-to-run margin (<1pp); disclosed, not hidden.
merge_provenance.calibration_note: calibration/ carried over from results_7b_fixed and NOT re-run: calibrate_metrics.py loads the HHEM + DeBERTa-NLI models to re-score, which the copy-only/no-model constraint forbids. It is a metric-validation diagnostic (HHEM vs NLI correlation) and does not feed paper_table / H1 / H2 / H3.
